files.text:
defmodule MyApp.Billing do
  @doc "Charge a customer for the given invoice."
  def charge(%{customer_id: id, amount: amount}) when is_integer(amount) and amount > 0 do
    case Stripe.charge(id, amount) do
      {:ok, charge} -> {:ok, charge}
      {:error, _reason} -> :error
    end
  end

  @doc "Refund a previously charged invoice."
  def refund(charge_id) do
    case Stripe.refund(charge_id) do
      {:ok, refund} -> {:ok, refund}
      {:error, _reason} -> :error
    end
  end
end
